case_title: CACH, LLC VS. ANDREW ESTACIO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY PURSUANT TO CCP98 IN LIEU OF DIRECT TESTIMONY AND AUTHENTICATING DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF APR-01-2014 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON APR-01-2014 AT 10:50 AM IN DEPT. 220, JAMES J MCBRIDE. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: EBURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 15034297) FILED BY ATTORNEY VOS, RYAN E.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ESTACIO, ANDREW ESTACIO INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-30-2013
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ESTACIO, ANDREW DBA ESTACIO INC
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: VOS, RYAN E. SUBSTITUTED FOR DUFEK, DAVE SEAN AS ATTORNEY FOR CACH, LLC
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ESTACIO, ANDREW DBA ESTACIO INC ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 HOURS
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON APR-01-2014 IN DEPT. 220 - JUDGMENT ENTERED FOR DEFENDANT ANDREW ESTACIO. PLAINTIFF TO RECEIVE NOTHING FROM MR. ESTACIO. EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE. CLERK: KEVIN DOUGHERTY.; (D220).
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT ESTACIO, ANDREW SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC SERVED MAY-12-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESTACIO, ANDREW
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC SERVED MAY-12-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESTACIO INC.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-18-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-01-2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON DEC-18-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
